analysis: Comprehensive end-to-end WebView emulator test suite for Next.js App Router project. The test suite emulates Android WebView, Chrome WebView 81, and Capacitor WebView environments. It validates WebView detection, safe-area initialization before hydration, TopBar visibility, Firebase persistence, and session persistence in Capacitor environments.
